title: Monomers, polymers and coating formulations that comprise at least one n-halamine precursor, a cationic center and a coating incorporation group
abstract: A modified surface with at least one cationic center and at least one compound. The surface can be modified by various methods. The result of these methods is that the cationic center and the compound are connected to the modified surface. The cationic center and the compound are connected to the modified surface so that both of the cationic center and the compound are available upon the modified surface to react with other chemicals or microorganisms that come into contact with or near to the modified surface. The availability of the cationic center and the compound cause the modified surface to have a functionality that it would not otherwise have. The number of molecules of the cationic center relative to the number of molecules of the at least one compound may influence the functionality of the modified surface.
claims: Claims 1. A method for connecting multiple cationic centers and multiple N-halamine precursor groups to a surface in a ratio of a number of connected cationic centers to a number of N- halamine precursor groups is within a range of about 1 : 1 to about 1 : 10. 2. The method of claim 1 , wherein the ratio is between about 1 : 1 and 4: 1. 3. The method of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the surface is modified. 4. A coating formulation for coating a substrate, the coating formulation comprising: a. multiple cationic centers; and b. multiple N-halamine precursor groups; wherein a ratio of a number of the multiple cationic centers to a number of Î-Î binding sites within the multiple N-halamine precursor groups is within a range of about 1 : 1 and about 10: 1. 3. A surface comprising multiple cationic centers and multiple N-halamine precursor groups that are both connected to the surface, wherein a ratio of a number of the multiple cationic centers to a number of Î-Î binding sites within the multiple N-halamine precursor groups is within a range of about 1 : 1 and about 10: 1.
